title: Question: Support for $finish_and_return
body:
---


Author Name: **R. Diez**
Original Redmine Message: 896 from https://www.veripool.org



---


I am writing an automated test suite, and I found Icarus Verilog's system task $finish_and_return( exit_code ) very handy. Is there anything similar in Verilator?

If not, I guess I could write some hack, as the user actually writes the main() function in the top-level .cpp file for the Verilator simulation. However, if Verilator did support such a system task and stored the exit code somewhere, I could grab it and return it from the main() function without too much fuss.

Thanks in advance,
  rdiez
